Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zhen of the Masons]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Zhen of the Masons was a teacher to Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Zhen lifted Shera into the air by her armpits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Zhen has a mustache.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Zhen taught Shera that it is best to sound confident when you have no idea what you are talking about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Zhen owns the House of the Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Zhen was waiting in the room with Kerian and Tyril.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Zhen carries two steel knives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Zhen is a fighter using knives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Zhen asked what to do next.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Lucan trained with Zhen before Meia reached the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Zhen has a house with racks containing dresses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Zhen has nothing to destroy the Heart.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen asked Lucan if he found what he came for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen is an old Mason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Zhen has a basement containing coffins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Zhen was not interrogated by Yala.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Zhen has a house with decoys and traps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Zhen has a home with potential entrances and alarms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Zhen uses a soup bowl as a shield.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
